promptOverlays.webfetch: When provider-specific docs, search, web reading, or image tools are relevant, prefer configured MiniMax resources such as the MiniMax docs and MiniMax MCP server available in this isolated setup.
promptOverlays.explore: This Claude Code setup is configured for MiniMax Cloud using MiniMax-M2.7 through the MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint. Keep model and provider assumptions consistent with that endpoint.
promptOverlays.planEnhanced: Plan with the active MiniMax Cloud provider and MiniMax-M2.7 model mapping in mind. Do not assume first-party Claude model names or Anthropic-only behavior unless this setup explicitly configures them.

tui.headline: MiniMax M2.7
features: MiniMax MCP server registered for web and image tools
tui.setupNote: Subscribe to the MiniMax Coding Plan and provide MINIMAX_API_KEY.
